title: lobelia lucayana
intro: Lobelia lucayana, also known as Cayenne Lobelia or Lobelia, is a plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the Lobeliaceae family. Traditionally, Lobelia lucayana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lobelia lucayana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and improved circulation. Lobelia lucayana can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, with common preparations including tea, capsules, and topical creams.
